lines.text: Central Perk, Ross, Chandler, and Phoebe are there. Joey is working.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, remember when I had a monkey?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, what, what was I thinking?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (he's just picked up their bill) Hey! So, what's with the 20 percent tip? Did I do something wrong?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Twenty percent is a pretty generous tip Joe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know what's more generous than that?! Fifty percent! Y'know what's even more generous than that?!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I see where you're goin'!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What's up with the greed Joe?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, look I'm sorry you guys, but it's just that I gotta get these new head shots made. And they're really expensive, y'know? I'm down to like three! Well, actually two 'cause one of 'em I kinda blackened in some teeth-Why did I do that?! (Hits himself in the head.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well isn't there something you can do to earn a little extra money? I mean, can't-can't you pick up, I don't know, an extra shift here?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Or, y'know, I used to beg for money. Of course it helps if you've got y'know a little of this (she sticks her chest out and shakes it) goin' on. Wow! I still have it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, wait! Wait! Don't you have an audition today? Yeah! Maybe you'll get that job!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, ha-ha-ha! Ooh! Wait a minute, I used to get medical experiments down on me all the time!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (reminiscing) Ah, finally an explanation.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no! I used to get paid for all kinds of medical stuff, remember? Let's see uh, well I don't want to donate sperm again. (To Ross) I really prefer doing that at the home office y'know? (Ross nods his head.) Ooh-ooh, maybe they want like some of my blood or-or spit or something, huh?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: (approaching with a tray with an order on it) Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: What did I tell you about talking to your friends while you're working?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhh do it?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: That guy (points) has been waiting for his coffee for ten minutes! He's complained about you three times! (He hands the coffee cup to Joey, assuming that Joey will deliver it and walks away.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, where was I? (Takes a sip of the coffee.)
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Ross is there as Phoebe and Rachel enter wearing workout clothes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, what have you guys been up to?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh! We went to a self-defense class today!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, kicking a guy in the crotch all morning really takes it out of ya!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Takes it out of you? (Laughs.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Now, we can kick anybody's ass!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: After one class? I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? You wanna see me self-defend myself?! Go over there (points) and pretend you're a sexual predator! Go on! I dare ya!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, of course you can defend yourself from an attack you know is coming, that's not enough. Look, I studying kara-tay for a long time, and there's a concept you should really be familiar with. It's what the Japanese call (he holds two fingers up to his temple, and he does this every time he says this word) unagi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Isn't that a kind of sushi?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, it's a concept!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah it is! It is! It's freshwater eel!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, maybe it means that too...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! I would kill for a salmon skin roll right now!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? Fine! Get attacked! I don't even care!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (deadpan) Come on Ross. We're sorry. Please tell us what it is.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Unagi is a state of total awareness. Okay? Only by achieving true unagi can you be prepared for any danger that may befall you!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You mean in case someone is trying to steal your bamboo sleeping mat or your kettle of fish?
Rachel laughs and Ross mocks her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (moves closer) All I'm saying is, it's one thing being prepared for an attack against like each other; whole another story being prepared for an attack, I don't know, like a (turns and puts his face close to Rachel's and screams) surprise!!
Rachel calmly wipes the spittle off her face.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, you know that one was coming, but that doesn't mean you have unagi. (Does the finger thing.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Phoebe) Ooh! Y'know what? If we made reservations, we could have unagi in about a half-hour.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what... (Moves away as Chandler enters, panicked.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey-hey, is Monica here?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, look I need your help, I don't know what to get her for Valentine's Day.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, Valentine's Day was like two weeks ago, so I wouldn't get her a calendar!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (laughs) She was working on Valentine's Day so we're celebrating it tonight.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ohh, hey! Why don't you book a date for both of you at one of those romantic spas?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, Joey, that's actually a really good idea!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And of course, crotchless panties.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well appealing as that does sound to her boyfriend (pause) and her brother, (the camera pans to Ross flashing Joey a very evil look; Joey gets scared) I can't do that we promised we'd make each other gifts this year.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Aw, I love that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You guys!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You can't make crotchless panties? You take, you take a pair of scissors and you just cut...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (interrupting him) Okay-okay-okay! So, making things. That sounds like so much fun.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I thought so to until I paper mached one of my eyes shut.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I love paper mache! What did you make?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I made a... (Does one of those gibberish words.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What is that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nothing!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So what are you gonna do?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, have you guys made anything that maybe I can take credit for?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh! I have! I have! I started making these little sock bunnies! (She takes out a sock that's been made into a bunny with eyes, nose, mouth, whiskers, and two other socks sown onto it for ears.) Oh for crying out loud!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, wait a minute! That is my sock!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Now, it's you little bunny friend. (She sticks it in Rachel's face and they both laugh.)

Monica and Chandler's, Chandler is desperately trying to make his Valentine's Day gift. He takes a paper cup, turns it upside down, sticks two pencils into the top, and hangs a coat hanger from the bottom.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (admiring his work) This, this actually is a... (Does the same gibberish word from before.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Honey, can I ask you a question about the Valentine's Day gifts?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do we have to make the entire thing?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes! Why, did you-you forget to make yours?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Of course, of course not. I just have to uh, go over to the place where I-I made it and pick-pick it up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. (They kiss.) Okay, I can't wait! This is going to be the best Valentine's Day ever! (Chandler giggles and exits.) I can't believe it! Make the presents! Make the presents!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sticking his head back in) What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm just so excited to make the presents! (Chandler does another sarcastic/scared laugh and leaves.) Shoot!
A Medical Research Office, Joey is there to sign up for an experiment, any experiment.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to the receptionist) Hi uh, I'm Joey Tribbiani and with all do respect I'd like to donate some fluids.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: We're actually at the end of one of our research cycles, so we're not looking for applicants right now.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh that's too bad. I've kinda been saving up. (She just looks at him in horror.) Uh, are you sure there's no studies I can participate in?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: Well, here's a schedule of what's coming up. (Hands it to him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks. (Starts to read it.) Well but this one starts now. (Points to one.)

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: Oh that one is available now, but only identical twins are eligible. It's a twins study.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But it's $2,000.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: Sorry.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well how about this one? Testing the effects of Joey Tribbiani on attractive nurse receptionists.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: We already got the results back on that on, and they're not good. (Joey beats a hasty retreat.)
The Hallway between the Apartments, Ross is hiding behind that bump out on Monica's side waiting for Phoebe and Rachel. As they come up the stairs, he jumps out and yells...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: DANGER!!! DANGER!!!!!
They both scream and jump away.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ross!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What the hell was that?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A lesson in the importance of unagi. (He starts doing the finger thing every time now.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh, you're a freak!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Perhaps. Now I'm curious, at what point during those girlish screams would you have begun to kick my ass?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, so we weren't prepared!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm sorry I had to take such drastic measures to make my point, but I-look, I just want you guys to be safe. (Monica comes out to throw out the garbage and Ross screams...) DANGER!!!!! (She completely ignores him and keeps walking.) Ahhh, huh? Unagi.
Cole-Geddes Casting Agency, Joey is there on his audition and thinking about that 2,000 bucks for the twins study.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (in his head) 2,000 bucks is a lot of money. Oh, I wish I had a twin. Where could I find someone who looks exactly like me? (The camera widens its shot to reveal a room full of Joey look-a-likes. Joey looks at the guy next to him and then back at his script.)
Ross's apartment, Ross is coming in from doing his laundry. He starts folding it as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (not turning around) Chandler. I sensed it was you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Unagi. I'm always aware.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, are you aware unagi (does the finger thing) is an eel?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't figure out what to make Monica.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, why don't you make her one of your little jokes.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm going crazy! Okay? Do you have any thing around here that looks homemade?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? She'd-she'd love this. (Picks up a model of the Saturn V rocket, that's the one that took man to the moon.) Uh, it's an exact replica of Apollo 8. I made it in the sixth grade.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I guess I could use that. I could say that your love sends me to the moon.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah-yeah, except Apollo 8 didn't actually land on the moon. But you-you-you could write that umm, your love lets me orbit the moon twice and return safely. (Apollo 8 was the first one that orbited the moon and the one that read the Christmas Story from the orbit of the moon on Christmas Eve, 1968. They also took the famous Earthrise picture of the Earth rising over the moon.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait a minute, I can't give this to her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because it says "Captain Ross" on the side and "I hate Monica" on the bottom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh.
Chandler leaves dejectedly. When the door closes Rachel and Phoebe jump out from behind the curtains and scream...

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Rachel
lines.text: DANGER!!!!!
Ross screams like a little girl.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ahhhhh, salmon skin roll. (She does the finger thing.)
Monica and Chandler's bedroom, he's still trying to figure out what to make Monica.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. Okay. (He goes to the closet, moves the clothes out of the way, and notices an empty hanger. He takes the empty hanger and bends it all out of shape. Then he holds it out as if he's giving it to her.) Yes honey, I made it myself. (He throws it down and goes to her chest, grabs something, goes to the bed table, and takes out a pair of scissors. He turns around and holds the scissors to the crotch of the panties he just removed.) I can't do it. I can't do it. (He throws them both down and continues looking. He opens another closet door and finds a tape.) Oh! Oh! A mixed tape! A mixed tape!! (He runs out into the living room.)
[Cut to the living room, Chandler is entering as Monica finishes wrapping her present for him on the kitchen table.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Hi! You uh, ready to exchange gifts?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sure! Okay, you go first.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, come here! Come here.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay! (She takes her present for him and they move over to sit on the couch.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Now, it's not wrapped because I just, just finished it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But I made you a tape of what I think are all romantic songs.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, what a great gift! Is The Way You Look Tonight on it?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (momentarily terrified) Maybe we'll have to listen and see!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I love it! Thank you so much!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, you ready to open yours?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.
He opens his present to find Phoebe's sock bunny from earlier.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's a sock bunny.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah-yeah, you remember how I call you bunny?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, I did one time, and-and I want to start doing it more. See that's what this is about.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I see. Y'know umm, Phoebe makes sock bunnies.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! No, she doesn't. Uh Phoebe, what she makes-that's uh-they're sock rabbits. They are completely different-Okay! Okay! Okay! I didn't make it! I'm sorry! I totally forgot about tonight and the fact that we're supposed to make the presents!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, it's okay. I don't...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No-no, it's not okay! It's not! I mean you were just... You're so incredible! You went through all this time and effort to make this tape for me! Y'know I'm just gonna-I, I am gonna make this up to you! I will! I-I am going to cook anything you want in here (points to the kitchen), and I am going to do anything you want in there! (Points to the bedroom.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (thinking it over) Well, I did put a lot of thought in the tape. (They both run into the bedroom.)
Commercial Break
Monica and Chandler's bedroom, they are relaxing in sexual bliss.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wow! (To the sock bunny still on his hand.) You are way to young to have seen that!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oops! (Covers its eyes.) Y'know, your birthday is in a month-and-a-half, what do you say I forget to get you a present for that too?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You are totally and completely 100% forgiven.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We have got to wash that! (Referring to the sock bunny.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! (Takes it off his hand and throws it behind the night-stand.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you remember that jacket that you love so much, that you thought was too expensive?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have done enough!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I wanna wake up early and go get it for you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No you don't-get it in black, not brown.
The oven dings.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oop, your cake is ready!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oop!
They both get out of bed and go get some cake.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, it's like that old saying, have some sex, eat some cake.
As they approach the kitchen, the door opens and in walks in a Joey look-a-like.

lines.speaker: Joey's Look-A-Like
lines.text: Hey Mon! Hey Chann! (He goes to the fridge) Just gettin' a soda! (Does so.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who the hell are you?!

lines.speaker: Joey's Look-A-Like
lines.text: I'm Joey! How are you doin'?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) No! No! No! No! No! How you doin'?! How you doin'-Damnit Carl! Go wait in the hall! (Goes into the hall.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, I got to apologize on the behalf of Carl.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who the hell is Carl?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, did I not mention? Carl is a guy I hired to be my identical twin for a medical research project.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know sometimes the good ideas are just right in front of you, aren't they?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, I know it sounds crazy, but I think it might work. Y'know? The only problem is, Carl's acting is... (Does the international hand symbol for so-so.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The only problem!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, he's the reason I didn't get that big Minute Maid commercial a couple of years ago remember? We were supposed to be brothers, but he messed it up.

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.text: (sticking his head back in) Hey, uh can I get a little piece of that cake?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Carl) Pizza!! We like Pizza!! Get out!!! (Carl does so.)
Phoebe and Rachel's, Phoebe and Rachel are returning.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Pat Sajak?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yep!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Alex Trebek?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, of course!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Chuck Woolery?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Definitely! Phoebe, you will not find a single game show host, who's ass I cannot kick.
They start to walk into the living room and notice someone's head sticking up from behind a chair. The camera cuts to the other side and we see it's Ross.

[Time lapse. The girls have Ross pinned face down. Phoebe is sitting on his back and arms while holding his head down and facing Rachel. Rachel is sitting on his knees and holding his lower legs vertically, causing Ross pain.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Say it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Say we are unagi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's not something you are! It's something you have!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Say it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? I can easily get out of this, but there is a chance you can get very, very hurt!
Rachel yanks on his legs again and he groans in pain.
The Medical Research office, Joey is there with Carl in the waiting room. Two identical twins come out and both wave by at the same time.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right Carl, we're next. Now remember, what is not gonna be?

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.text: Another Minute Maid fiasco.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's right! And what are you not gonna do?

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.text: Well, I'm not gonna talk because...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (gets very angry) Damnit Carl! (Carl goes to say something more, and Joey silences him with a grunt.)

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: (entering) (To the receptionist) Can I have the next one please? (Takes the form.) Joey and Tony Tribbiani. (Joey and Carl stand up.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's us.

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: (seeing they're not identical) But uh, this is a study for identical twins.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's right, $2,000.

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: But, you're not identical twins.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Damnit Carl!
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is getting ready for Chandler's arrival. He enters and finds the place lit with candles and dinner on the table.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my good God.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! Continuing the countdown of your favorite meals. Tonight, No. 3, macaroni and cheese with cut up hot dogs.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, you have done enough! Okay? You have to stop this now.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I will! But not tonight. For dinner music, I thought we could listen to that tape you made me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, the mixed tape.
Monica pushes play and The Way You Look Tonight starts to play.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The Way You Look Tonight is on here! Dance with me?
He hesitates, then goes over to dance with her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You are just the sweetest. (They kiss.)
Suddenly, a strange and familiar voice comes out of the tape player. Here's a hint, OH...MY...GAWD!! That's right, it's Janice!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: I love the way you look every night Chandler! (Monica breaks the kiss and Chandler freezes in terror.) That's why I made you this tape! Happy Birthday! Love Janice!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! You're the sweetest! (He tries to kiss her but Monica backs away with a look that could kill on her face.)
A women's self-defense class, the instructor is just finishing a class.

lines.speaker: The Instructor
lines.text: Okay ladies, that ends today's class, and let's remember, let's be safe out there.
The women all clap and start to leave as Ross comes up to the instructor. Apparently he was hiding in the back.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's a great class.

lines.speaker: The Instructor
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, yeah, I was watching. (The instructor just nods and walks away.) Umm, hey, a couple of questions though. Umm, about that-that-that last move where the woman tripped you and then pinned you to the floor, what-what-what-what would you do next?

lines.speaker: The Instructor
lines.text: Well, she would take her keys and try to jam them...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No. No-no. No. What would you do next?

lines.speaker: The Instructor
lines.text: Who? Me the attacker?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes that's right.

lines.speaker: The Instructor
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I tired attacking two women, did not work.

lines.speaker: The Instructor
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, I mean it's okay, I mean, they're-they're my friends. In fact, I-I-I was married to one of them.

lines.speaker: The Instructor
lines.text: Let me get this straight man, you attacked your ex-wife?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, no! No-no! No, I tired! But I couldn't. That's why I'm here. Maybe we could attack them together? (He glares at him.) That-that's a no.
Monica and Chandler's, Chandler is trying to explain himself to Monica.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I am so, so, so, so sorry!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (not buying it) Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And I will cook anything you want in here (points to the kitchen), and do anything in there! (Points to the bedroom.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (pointing to the kitchen) Yeah you will! (Points to the bedroom) And, are you kiddin' me?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Come on Monica, it's our Valentine's Day. Please? Please-please, please?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (They hug.)

lines.speaker: Janice's Voice
lines.text: (singing) My funny valentine, sweet comic valentine! You make me high over my heart!
Monica breaks the hug and starts for the bedroom.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, are we going in there?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I am!! (Enter her room and closes the door behind her.)

lines.speaker: Janice's Voice
lines.text: (singing) You're look for laughable...(She does the now patented Janice laugh.)
Ending Credits
The street in front of Central Perk, Ross is walking up and sees two women that look like Phoebe and Rachel from behind.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah-ha, nowhere to run! (He starts to run towards them.)
[Cut to Central Perk, Phoebe and Rachel are sitting up by the window because two guys have their couch.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't like sitting up here! I'm just gonna over... (She starts to get up.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (stopping her) No Rachel! They got here first!

Ross appears at the window behind them crouched behind a garbage can and ready to spring his attack on who he thinks are Phoebe and Rachel. The camera cuts to the exterior view and Phoebe and Rachel call the shots from inside.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why is Ross doing that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: DANGER!!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! Why is he jumping on those women!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: We should help him!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I... Well, I don't think they need any help.

Ross starts to scream and run away. He stops in front of the window of Central Perk to check the pursuit and notices Phoebe and Rachel inside looking at him. He mouths, "What?" Then realizes that the women he attacked are closing in so he screams and runs away.
End
